description: A premium, cosmic-themed chess learning website named AstraAPP. Features deep navy/blue starfields, glowing galaxies, and metallic gold/silver chess pieces. Merges functional app components with an immersive marketing landing page.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous (p-8, p-12) for marketing, Compact (p-4, p-6) for dashboards/play screens.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B1120]/60 border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.cards: Glassmorphism with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10), backdrop-blur-md, soft ambient drop shadow
surface_strategies.chessboard_container: The 'Tracing Beam' - 1px glowing cyan/blue border that frames the board to feel technical and alive
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat dark background with metallic gold or electric blue text, subtle 1px border, hover adds glow shadow

motion_and_interactions.board_moves: Smooth snapping animations for chess pieces

components.navigation: Sticky glass header with Logo, Play, Puzzles, Lessons, Coach, and a Gold 'Play Now' CTA.
components.hero: Full viewport height, deep galaxy background image with a dark overlay (bg-black/40). Large glowing typography, floating gold chess piece SVGs.
components.chessboard: Custom SVG/HTML grid. Light squares (#2D3B55), dark squares (#0B1120). Pieces should use Unicode or custom SVGs styled in metallic gold (#FFD700) and silver (#C0C0C0).
components.lesson_cards: Bento-style glass cards, each with an astronomical icon and deep blue gradient overlay.
components.ai_coach: Chat interface using Shadcn components, styled as a 'Control Room' terminal. Cosmic background blur, text in 'Outfit', AI messages have subtle cyan borders.

image_urls.description: Deep starfield and milky way galaxy. Use behind the hero section with a dark overlay to make text pop.
Blue and purple galaxy texture. Good for subtle card backgrounds or AI Coach panel backgrounds.
Moody chessboard scene for the 'Learn Strategy' or 'Play AI' sections on the marketing page.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text against dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow for text over galaxy images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Rajdhani' for headings and 'Outfit' for body fonts. Link them via Google Fonts.
Build a custom responsive chessboard component using standard HTML/Tailwind, ensuring squares have the specific cosmic hex colors provided.
For chess pieces, use standard Unicode chess characters (♚, ♛, ♜, ♝, ♞, ♟) but style them with text-shadow and metallic gold/silver colors.
Implement the 'AstraAPP' brand identity heavily in the hero section.
Ensure all Shadcn components (buttons, dialogs, inputs) are customized to fit the dark cosmic theme, removing any default white/gray Vercel-like styling.
Include a functional layout structure navigating between Home, Play, Puzzles, Lessons, and Coach.
